baselines.name: Chat-only mobile coding flow
baselines.unit_under_test: A mobile chat assistant without a harness evidence layer.
evidence_requirements: generated artifact or explicit blocked output
baselines.expected_limit: May produce plausible artifacts but lacks structured harness traces and verifier outputs.

baselines.name: Desktop remote IDE flow
baselines.unit_under_test: A conventional desktop or remote IDE workflow used from outside the phone.
baselines.expected_limit: Strong execution access, but not a phone-native control-plane baseline.

baselines.name: Phone-native mobile harness flow
baselines.unit_under_test: The proposed phone-native harness control loop.
evidence_requirements: mobile-tier screenshots or logs when required
baselines.expected_limit: Cannot count as final mobile evidence until T2/T3/T5 artifacts are attached.

fairness_controls: Use the same frozen task subset for every baseline.
Use the same input fixtures and task prompts.
Record the exact model provider and model version for every run.
Use the same authorization state for GitHub-delivery tasks; unavailable authorization is typed as blocked.
Apply the same time budget and human-intervention logging.
Do not compare T0 fixture evidence against T2/T3/T5 mobile-device evidence as if they were the same tier.
blocked_conditions: No Android T2 run evidence is attached yet.
No iOS T3/T4 run evidence is attached yet.
No authorized GitHub T5 sandbox run evidence is attached yet.
No model/provider lock file has been recorded for baseline runs yet.
No human-intervention annotation sheet has been completed yet.
required_result_artifacts: mobile-tier screenshots/logs for tasks requiring mobile evidence
evidence_boundary: This report defines the comparison protocol only. It contains no baseline result and must not be used as a performance table until run artifacts exist for all baselines.
